message:
chore(beads): RusticMaple tick 33 progress on ft-xbnl0.2.3

ShardedWeztermClient route lookup end-to-end Cx-first (5ea05016).
WeztermInterface delegation is now end-to-end cx-aware with no
ambient-Cx hops in any production impl path.
